channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: US FTC Argues Meta Must Be Broken Up Over Monopoly Allegations
item.description: The US Federal Trade Commission argues that Meta Platforms Inc. must be broken up for illegally monopolizing the social media market after buying Instagram and WhatsApp more than a decade ago.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Microsoft warns that anyone who deleted mysterious folder that appeared after latest Windows 11 update must take action to put it back
item.description: If you deleted the folder in question, your PC is missing a security fix – here’s what you need to do to resolve the situation.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Leaked Avengers: Doomsday images seemingly tease meeting between rival X-Men characters – and a Marvel hero who wasn't part of the original cast reveal
item.description: The first set leaks from Avengers 5 have been posted online and they reveal some interesting things about the MCU film.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg takes the stand in historic antitrust trial
item.description: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg faced questions about his intentions in acquiring Instagram on the first day of a historic antitrust trial.
item.dc:creator: Barbara Ortutay, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Some top tech leaders have embraced Trump. That's created a political divide in Silicon Valley
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (AP) — Like many in the tech industry, Jeremy Lyons used to think of himself as a relatively apolitical guy.
item.dc:creator: NICHOLAS RICCARDI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Inside ‘Signalgate’: How The Atlantic navigated a national security scandal
item.description: When government officials accidentally included Jeffrey Goldberg, The Atlantic’s editor-in-chief, in a Signal group chat discussing U.S. military plans, all hell broke loose.
item.dc:creator: Robert Safian, Fast Company

item.title: Disney Research Creates Emotional Robot that Acts and Reacts like a Human
item.description: Disney Research has created an autonomous humanoid robot that can mimic human emotions and behaviors in real time, using advanced artificial intelligence to replicate natural gestures and deliberate actions with striking accuracy.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Musk, Tesla caught in crosshairs of Trump trade war with China
item.description: President Trump’s escalating trade war with China is putting Elon Musk and Tesla in a tight spot as the electric vehicle manufacturer faces climbing tariffs in one of its most important markets.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Via porn, gore and ultra-violence, extremist groups are sinking hooks online into the very young
item.description: PARIS (AP) — After his arrest, the boy's mother was stunned to discover that her 12-year-old had been learning how to kill and gorging on videos of decapitation and torture so gruesome they made even case-hardened French court officials look away.
item.dc:creator: JOHN LEICESTER, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: CIO Sharon Mandell transforms Juniper Networks for the AI era
item.description: CIOs have elevated their stature in the business by driving digital transformations for nearly a decade. Now, top-level IT chiefs are taking this formula a step further by putting digital initiatives to work in helping transform the business itself.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Defining leadership through mentorship and a strong network
item.description: Andrea Schulze understands the importance of mentorship when it comes to fostering more gender diversity in the tech industry, especially up to the leadership level.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: The problem with Google’s Pixel 9a
item.description: Let’s get one thing out of the way first: Google’s Pixel 9a is one heck of a device. I’ve had the latest Pixel gizmo in my man-claws for a couple o’ weeks now, thanks to a loaner review unit provided by Google.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: OpenAI countersues Elon Musk in legal dispute over ChatGPT maker's business ambitions
item.description: OpenAI is suing Elon Musk for unfair competition and interfering with its business relationships with investors and customers, escalating a legal battle between the ChatGPT maker and the billionaire who helped bankroll the artificial intelligence startup a decade ago.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: OpenAI fears irreparable harm from Musk, files countersuit
item.description: OpenAI has filed a countersuit against Elon Musk, accusing the billionaire of a sustained campaign to damage the company and urging a US federal court to block further actions it described as unlawful and disruptive.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Cutting-edge drone tech maps land and water with laser accuracy
item.description: New drone technology maps land and water with stunning accuracy, giving researchers and conservationists a new way to understand our planet.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: April update has broken Windows Hello for some devices but there’s a quick fix
item.description: A software hiccup has occurred with Windows Hello following this month’s security updates, one that could prevent users from logging in via facial recognition.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Microsoft says it's 'slowing or pausing' some AI data center projects, including $1B plan for Ohio
item.description: Microsoft said it is “slowing or pausing” some of its data center construction, including a $1 billion project in Ohio, the latest sign that the demand for artificial intelligence technology that drove a massive infrastructure expansion might not need quite as many powerful computers as expected.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Fortinet embeds AI capabilities across Security Fabric platform
item.description: Fortinet has expanded support for AI across its core cybersecurity platform to protect enterprise customers from evolving threats and simplify network and security operations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Top network and data center events 2025
item.description: Ready to travel to gain hands-on experience with new networking and infrastructure tools? Tech conferences – in person and virtual – give attendees a chance to access product demos, network with peers, earn continuing education credits, and catch a celebrity keynote or live entertainment.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Humanoid robot breakdances its way into history
item.description: Atlas robot by Boston Dynamics amazes tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson with its breakdancing moves.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Scientists genetically engineer wolves with white hair and muscular jaws like the extinct dire wolf
item.description: Three genetically engineered wolves that may resemble extinct dire wolves are trotting, sleeping and howling in an undisclosed secure location in the U.S., according to the company that aims to bring back lost species.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTINA LARSON, Associated Press, ABC 4
